canonRefs.label: Kellan Or
canonRefs.preview:
# Kellan Or

Kellan Or is a cistern scout who sells route rumors to anyone willing to cross the [[Old Roads]].

He once carried the [[Glass Key]] for the [[Ashen Choir]], but he claims the key changed hands before [[Mara Voss]] arrived at [[Ash Gate]].

## Playable Pressure

- Kellan can become an ally if Mara shares the truth of the [[Iron Meridian]].
- He withholds cistern access unless the player has the [[Cinder Lantern]] or a favor from the [[Glass Cartographers]].

canonRefs.label: Mara Voss
canonRefs.preview:
# Mara Voss

Mara is a cartographer tracking the old roads beneath [[Ash Gate]] for the [[Glass Cartographers]].
She believes the [[Iron Meridian]] is not a myth but a broken navigation system.
dsadasd

## Current Thread

- Follow the signal from the [[Iron Meridian]].
- Decide whether the [[First Road]] is a route, a ritual, or a memory.
- dasdasdasd

canonRefs.label: Sera Nym
canonRefs.preview:
# Sera Nym

Sera Nym is a silent archivist embedded inside the [[Glass Cartographers]] on behalf of the [[Ashen Choir]].

She believes the [[First Road]] should stay buried because every opened route demands a [[Resonance Debt]] from the traveler who names it.

## Branch Use

Sera is the pressure point for routes that trade knowledge for safety.

canonRefs.label: Concepts
canonRefs.preview:
# Concepts

Description of this folder's contents.

canonRefs.label: First Road
canonRefs.preview:
# First Road

The First Road is the original decision-route beneath [[Ash Gate]].

Unlike the [[Old Roads]], it does not connect places. It connects a person to the version of themselves that made a different promise.

The [[Iron Meridian]] can locate it only after the player resolves who owns the [[Glass Key]].

canonRefs.label: Old Roads
canonRefs.preview:
# Old Roads

The Old Roads are buried routes that connect decisions instead of places.

The [[Iron Meridian]] can sense them, and the [[Glass Cartographers]] keep partial surveys below [[Ash Gate]].

canonRefs.label: Resonance Debt
canonRefs.preview:
# Resonance Debt

Resonance Debt is the price paid when a traveler forces an [[Old Roads]] route to remember them.

The debt can be paid with memory, an oath, or a carried flame from the [[Cinder Lantern]].

The [[Ashen Choir]] calls it justice. [[Mara Voss]] calls it blackmail.

canonRefs.label: Items
canonRefs.preview:
# Items

Description of this folder's content

canonRefs.label: Cinder Lantern
canonRefs.preview:
# Cinder Lantern

The Cinder Lantern is a miner's lamp modified by the [[Glass Cartographers]] to reveal false passages.

Its blue flame exposes ash-thread traps inside the [[Ember Cistern]].

When carried onto the [[First Road]], it can absorb one [[Resonance Debt]] before going dark.

canonRefs.label: Glass Key
canonRefs.preview:
# Glass Key

The Glass Key is a brittle charm that opens cartographic locks in the lower archive.

It belonged to [[Kellan Or]] before [[Sera Nym]] claimed it for the [[Ashen Choir]].

It can tune the [[Iron Meridian]] toward the [[First Road]] or shatter to erase one [[Resonance Debt]].

canonRefs.label: Iron Meridian
canonRefs.preview:
# Iron Meridian

The Iron Meridian is a relic compass that points toward decisions instead of north.

It last activated below [[Ash Gate]], where [[Mara Voss]] found a route marker for the [[First Road]].

canonRefs.label: Locations
canonRefs.preview:
# Locations

Places, routes, settlements, regions, and sites used by the active universe.

canonRefs.label: Ash Gate
canonRefs.preview:
# Ash Gate

Ash Gate is a trade city built against black basalt cliffs.

Mara Voss begins her search here after receiving the [[Iron Meridian]].

The city archive is managed by the [[Glass Cartographers]].

As it began

canonRefs.label: Ember Cistern
canonRefs.preview:
# Ember Cistern

The Ember Cistern sits below [[Ash Gate]], where hot springs keep the old tunnels breathing.

Its sluice gates hide a marker for the [[First Road]], but the [[Ashen Choir]] marks every trespass with ash-thread.

The [[Cinder Lantern]] burns blue when the cistern is lying.

canonRefs.label: Organizations
canonRefs.preview:
# Organizations

Description of this folder's contents.

canonRefs.label: Ashen Choir
canonRefs.preview:
# Ashen Choir

The Ashen Choir guards the thresholds below [[Ash Gate]] and teaches that every road has a voice.

They cooperate with the [[Glass Cartographers]] in public, but privately they steal surveys that mention the [[Old Roads]].

Their oldest rite requires the [[Glass Key]] and a traveler willing to accept a [[Resonance Debt]].

canonRefs.label: Glass Cartographers
canonRefs.preview:
# Glass Cartographers

The Glass Cartographers maintain the civic maps of [[Ash Gate]] and suppress records of the [[First Road]].

They trained [[Mara Voss]], but no longer trust what she found in the [[Iron Meridian]].

canonRefs.label: Stories
canonRefs.preview:
# Stories
Description of this folder's contents.

canonRefs.label: First Road
canonRefs.preview:
# First Road

Mara Voss follows the [[Iron Meridian]] from the lower archive of [[Ash Gate]] into the [[Ember Cistern]].

The path splits around three questions: who holds the [[Glass Key]], whether the [[Ashen Choir]] can be trusted, and what kind of [[Resonance Debt]] Mara is willing to carry.

canonRefs.label: Scenes
canonRefs.preview:
# Scenes

Description of this folder's contents.
dasdas

canonRefs.label: Cistern Threshold
canonRefs.preview:
# Cistern Threshold

At the sealed sluice below [[Ash Gate]], [[Mara Voss]] must decide whether to burn the [[Cinder Lantern]], bargain with [[Sera Nym]], or trust [[Kellan Or]] with the route.

This scene is a branch hub for inventory, trust, and knowledge conditions.

canonRefs.label: Market Interference
canonRefs.preview:
# Market Interference

[[Mara Voss]] follows a false needle-reading through the ash market and discovers [[Kellan Or]] bargaining with a courier from the [[Ashen Choir]].

The scene can reveal the [[Glass Key]], expose [[Sera Nym]], or force Mara to chase Kellan into the [[Ember Cistern]] without preparation.

canonRefs.label: Road Under Ash
canonRefs.preview:
# Road Under Ash

The [[First Road]] opens beneath the [[Ember Cistern]] and asks [[Mara Voss]] which promise she wants to preserve.

The ending depends on whether the player carries the [[Glass Key]], the [[Cinder Lantern]], or an unpaid [[Resonance Debt]].

canonRefs.label: The Basalt Archive
canonRefs.preview:
# The Basalt Archive

[[Mara Voss]] breaks into the lower archive of [[Ash Gate]] and finds a sealed survey from the [[Glass Cartographers]].

The survey points to the [[Old Roads]] but contradicts the pull of the [[Iron Meridian]].
